{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315401155594E0DCF28A667EF75"}"},"total":1020},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7397458543336719128","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"读了一百多章，写的真好，作为爽文来讲对战斗日常的细节写的很精细，NPC智商都在线。风格搞笑，但不显得低俗。视角很多变，不像一些文盯着主角写。很适合改编成短剧的形式。","text_exts":[{"e":35,"s":32,"text":"NPC","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=NPC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774251611A667EF75%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227397458543336719128%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227303839226850708542%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22NPC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722356842,"group_id":"7303839226850708542","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyNRVlTa9dlDotV8TZk84KPZtctvRh37kosaWH4T8qYC","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3969656911050685","user_name":"喜欢麦豆的丹叶辰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3969656911050685","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7303839226850708542","book_info":{"abstract":"【无敌文】【爽文】【儒雅懒散】【长生】
“现在社会负面太多了，潜藏在都市中的妖怪、魑魅魍魉会成长，现在妖魔横行人流中，世人不知，总有一天会爆发。那一天，失去信仰的人都会捡起来信仰，他们求佛、求上帝、求神仙救……”
“停了老头，你说的那是他没下山的情况下。”
“嘿嘿，我这不是说故事嘛，你得让我编呀。”
他下山了。
世间的不太平，平了。
“他下山，妖魔就没了根，得瑟瑟发抖。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o300da5a31a22c4d81f3322779323a21e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"仰山听雪","author_id":"","book_id":"7303839226850708542","book_name":"一句话，让万妖为我守墓十万年","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#503030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7303839410485740094","read_count":"37553","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1118961"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"479","tags":"都市高武,都市,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7fa39ba05b001a139c58087382546ba5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435611&x-signature=62%2FLSrUscuttuBpXahgrxgsWJ%2Fk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4002680386100174","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"125"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315401155594E0DCF28A667EF75"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":27812},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7325771613147415333","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书不错，刻画的打斗场面也精彩，只是有一点我想说的就是，描述中的大神通者的战斗惊天动地也没刻意隐瞒，为何都只局限当局者，亲历者知道[奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705665062,"group_id":"7303839226850708542","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8A1NDObXYPeoigP+72aFly5TPgNocKVTZ5ZlUF2icgm","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/user-avatar/f2f90522005a1a4e5553a02d67802e8f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792796&x-signature=J%2Fdb2sriyWh4UghCPpiEVONglCs%3D","user_id":"1143911461717231","user_name":"我们之间"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1143911461717231","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7303839226850708542","book_info":{"abstract":"【无敌文】【爽文】【儒雅懒散】【长生】
